Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-27-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Griffin Schindler, Esq., DECKER LAW (949) 942-6525 gschindler@decker-law.com Attorneys for Petitioner Richard McCollam
Rick Smith, Esq., MARKUN ZUSMAN & COMPTON LLP (415) 438-4515 Attorneys for Respondent
Royal Alliance Associates, Inc.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER RICHARD MCCOLLAM'S Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award

Petitioner's petition to vacate arbitration award is denied.

(See word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
